title: SSH Skill Agent Decision Record
description: A concise, auditable operational decision summary for AI-agent-driven SSH operations. This is not a chain-of-thought log and must not contain credentials or private infrastructure identifiers.

intent.description: The operational goal, stated generically and without secrets.

environment.description: Observed or inventory-derived environment such as dev, staging, prod.

hypothesis.description: The current best explanation. Must be treated as provisional until verified.

primitive.description: Primitive script to use, e.g. sys.sh, service.sh, runner.sh. No path separators.

command.description: Human-readable command summary. Must not include credentials or private infrastructure identifiers.

expected_effect.description: Expected state change or observation result.

output_limit.description: Bounded output rule, e.g. primitive limit 50 or tail -100.

verification.description: Post-action checks in natural-language summary form. State-changing actions must define verification.

verification_actions.description: Optional executable primitive checks for agent_gate.sh. These must remain generic primitives, not business workflows.

rollback.description: Optional rollback step summaries or references to backups.

rollback_actions.description: Optional executable primitive rollback actions for agent_gate.sh. These must remain generic primitives, not business workflows.

stop_condition.description: Condition under which the Agent stops instead of continuing autonomous actions.

confidence.description: Confidence in the hypothesis-action pair, based on live observations.

escalation_reason.description: Reason to ask a human or require explicit confirmation.
